name: Homemade Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 teaspoon dry mustard, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, a dash of ground red pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
2. Add the 2 egg yolks and 2 tablespoons vinegar to the bowl; beat until well combined.
3. Slowly add the 2 cups oil in a steady stream while continuously beating the mixture with an electric mixer. Keep adding oil until about 1/4 cup has been incorporated.
4. Continue mixing, then slowly add the remaining oil in small portions (about 1 teaspoon at a time), alternating with the last half cup of oil and 2 tablespoons lemon juice, until fully emulsified.
5. Store the mayonnaise in a tightly covered jar in the refrigerator for up to 4 weeks.
Creamy Fruit Dressing:
Prepare the mayonnaise as directed. Mix 1 cup of mayonnaise with 1 cup sour cream, 1½ teaspoons shredded orange peel, 3 tablespoons orange juice, and 4 teaspoons sugar.
Herb Dressing:
Prepare the mayonnaise as directed. Combine it with 2 tablespoons finely chopped onion, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1 tablespoon dry sherry, 1 clove minced garlic, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, and ½ teaspoon dried mixed crushed salad herbs (such as basil, marjoram, oregano, bay leaves, and rosemary).
